summary: Phase 2 testing completed for AI-First Consulting portfolio. All backend APIs working correctly including new Lead Magnet, Admin Dashboard, and ICS Calendar features. Frontend mostly functional with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Custom Select component for topic selection not responding to Playwright automation
ui_bugs.note: Form loads correctly, issue is with test automation interaction, not user functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Health check, Contact form, Available appointments, Book appointment, Calendar ICS download, AI Chat, Get contacts
Backend: Admin login and stats (NEW Phase 2)
Frontend: Homepage sections (Hero, Features, Testimonials, Lead Magnet, CTA)
Frontend: Testimonials section with 4 testimonials and star ratings
Frontend: Lead Magnet form submission and success state
Frontend: Admin login and dashboard functionality
Frontend: Admin dashboard tabs and data tables
